summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pudge Wars HTML5 Canvas game. All core game mechanics verified including rendering, controls, movement, and hook firing. Game renders correctly with proper visual elements and responds to all user inputs.
passed_tests: Canvas game renders correctly (1000x700px) with green grass areas and blue river
Score display shows 'Score: 0 / 15' in top-left corner
Right-click player movement works correctly within boundaries
Q key hook firing mechanism works with visible white hook and chain
Player stays below river boundary (movement restrictions work)
Bots move randomly in top area above river
Game loop runs smoothly with requestAnimationFrame
Keyboard controls are responsive (Q, R keys)
No console errors or JavaScript errors detected
Game canvas has proper data-testid for testing
